summary: Iteration 5 verified the broken-image bug fix on the 17 production routes (3 newly added: /wine-tours, /birthday-celebrations, /prom-transportation) plus all functional regressions. PRIMARY ASSERTION PASSED: 0 broken images across all 17 routes after full-page lazy-load scroll (per-route image counts: / 9, /fleet 8, /services 3, /airport-transportation 6, /corporate-transportation 6, /wedding-transportation 6, /wine-tours 6, /birthday-celebrations 6, /prom-transportation 6, /hourly-chauffeur 6, /long-distance-transportation 6, /service-areas 3, /about 5, /reviews 3, /gallery 15, /faq 3, /contact 3). Every route has a unique <title>, single H1 matching spec (Wine Tour Chauffeur Service / Birthday Limo & Party Transportation / Prom Limo Service). Fleet page confirms 5 vehicles with correct capacities (Escalade 5/5, Sprinter 13/12, Sedan/E-Class/S-Class 3/2). Home Services section lists all 8 services with working Wine/Cake/Sparkles icons and no missing-icon crash. Airport cards BWI/DCA/IAD/MTN/PHL all present via data-testid='airport-card-*'. Quote estimator default (Economy Sedan, 20mi) shows $115 – $145; switching to Sprinter gives $230 – $290; trip type Hourly gives $485 – $605 (3hr min). Reserve button (quote-book-btn) navigates to /contact. Navbar Services dropdown lists all 8 services including Wine Tours/Birthdays/Proms; Wine Tours nav OK. Unknown route /nonexistent-xyz redirects to /. Booking form on /contact submits successfully with sonner toast 'Inquiry received! Our team will contact you shortly.' Backend pytest: 13/13 pass on /api/admin/* and /api/bookings. Sitemap returns 200 with exactly 17 URLs including the 3 new service pages. Zero JS pageerrors across all tested routes. GA4 gtag dormant state causes no errors.
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteEstimator uses Radix Select WITHOUT a hidden native <select> twin (estimator native selects=0, comboboxes=2), unlike the BookingForm on /contact which DOES have hidden native selects for testing. Consider adding the same hidden-native-select pattern to QuoteEstimator for parity and automation reliability.

Still no DELETE endpoint for admin bookings (returns 405). Cleanup continues to rely on direct pymongo delete_many on TEST_/UI_TEST prefixes — works fine, but a /api/admin/bookings/{id} DELETE would improve hygiene.

Two service pages (birthday-celebrations and prom-transportation) reuse the same IMAGES.celebration hero image — intentional but worth noting in case the team wants visually distinct heroes for SEO/UX differentiation.
data-testid naming on BookingForm fields ('input-*') still diverges from the wrapper ('booking-form', 'booking-submit'). Not blocking but inconsistent — see iteration_4 note.
GA4 layer is dormant (no REACT_APP_GA4_ID) and produces no errors — confirmed window.gtag undefined does not throw.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (17/17 routes, 0 broken images, theme, quote estimator recalc, booking submit, redirect, sitemap=17)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 booking via UI form (UI_TEST_Iter5_<ts>) and 1 via pytest (TEST_John Smith). All test bookings deleted via pymongo delete_many on MONGO_URL/DB_NAME with regex ^(TEST_|UI_TEST) on name / ^(TEST_|ui_test) on email. Remaining bookings in collection: 0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 17 routes load cleanly with 0 broken images. Sitemap = 17 URLs. Default quote = $115 – $145 (Economy Sedan 20mi). QuoteEstimator uses Radix Select (no hidden native select inside [data-testid='quote-estimator']); to change vehicle/trip-type in tests, use page.locator('[data-testid=quote-estimator] [role=combobox]').nth(0|1).click() then page.get_by_role('option', name=...). BookingForm on /contact DOES have hidden native selects (use [data-testid=booking-form] select - 2 of them: index 0=service, index 1=vehicle). Toast text on submit: 'Inquiry received! Our team will contact you shortly.' Admin password verified working. Use pymongo (with python-dotenv on /app/backend/.env) for direct DB cleanup, NOT raw os.environ.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — broken-image bug remains resolved; all 20 IMAGES.* CDN URLs return HTTP 200 (verified by main agent via HEAD), and in-browser naturalWidth check after lazy-load scroll on every route returns 0 broken across 102 total elements. The 3 new pages (wine-tours, birthday-celebrations, prom-transportation) render with hero, intro, 6 bullets, recommended vehicles, CTA, unique title/meta, and single H1 per spec.
